name: Arcee AI
description: US open intelligence lab producing frontier open-weight LLMs (Trinity series) with model merging and distillation expertise.

seo.title: Arcee AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Arcee AI: US open intelligence lab producing frontier open-weight LLMs (Trinity series) with model merging and distillation expertise.

when_to_use: Fine-tuning open-weight frontier models via model merging
Distilling large LLMs into smaller deployable versions
Running Trinity-series models locally for air-gapped deployments
Benchmarking merged model variants on domain-specific evals

pros: Model merging expertise lowers training cost
Distillation services for custom domain models
cons: Less turnkey than closed API providers
Smaller model zoo than major labs
review.verdict: For teams that want owned, domain-tuned open models rather than renting frontier APIs.
review.best_for: Enterprises building domain-specific LLMs on open weights
review.not_for: Teams wanting a hosted chat API with zero training effort
